programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park
programme.desc: "London Calling: Live in Hyde Park" is a concert video of Bruce Springsteen & the E Street Band's performance during the Hard Rock Calling music festival in Hyde Park, London on June 28, 2009.

programme.title: Led Zeppelin - Physical Graffiti: A Classic Album Under Review
programme.desc: This is a documentary film about the build-up, making, release, and music contained on this most revered of albums. This is the complete story behind what Rolling Stone called their Tommy, Beggars Banquet and Sgt. Pepper rolled into one.

programme.title: Coldplay - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: John Mellencamp - Plain Spoken: Live in Chicago
programme.desc: John Mellencamp's career in music, spanning more than 42 years, has seen him transition from pop star to one of the most highly regarded songwriters of a generation.

programme.title: Supertramp: Breakfast In America: Live in Paris
programme.desc: Supertramp's Breakfast In America was the biggest selling album in the world in 1979. Following the album's release Supertramp embarked on a 10-month world tour which arrived in Paris at the end of November.

programme.title: Peter Gabriel - Secret World: Live
programme.desc: Filmed in Modena, Italy across two nights in November 1993 as part of Peter Gabriel's acclaimed Secret World Live tour in support of the Us album.

programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring and Rock Im Park are annual music festivals at the Nürburgring racetrack in western Germany; Depeche Mode performs at the event.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Dr. Dre: Beat by Beat
programme.desc: Renowned for being one of the founding fathers of gangsta rap, Dr. Dre has been revered for bringing innovation and slick technique to the world of hip-hop leaves fans thirsting for more.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The RZA, The GZA, 'Ol Dirty Bastard, Inspectah Deck, Raekwon The Chef, U-God, Ghostface Killah, Cappadonna, Masta Killa and Method Man cut a song - "Protect Ya Neck" - and the world hasn't been the same since.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Wu-Tang Clan's underground rap single starts to blow up and business moved fast. Despite their success, things were still going on back home in the projects that affected their friends and family — the Wu weren't immune to it. Nor were they bulletproof.

programme.title: Darryl Jones: In The Blood
programme.desc: Follows the evolution of Jones, who grew up on the South Side of Chicago.

programme.title: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message
programme.desc: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message is an inspiring and entertaining program about the remarkable life of \\"The Godfather Soul\\" that features his greatest hits including "Living in America" and "I Feel Good."

programme.title: Living on Soul
programme.desc: Filmed during their three-night, sold-out residency at the historic Apollo Theater, this hybrid docu-concert film features the late great Sharon Jones, Charles Bradley and the rest of the Grammy-nominated Daptone Records family.

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake
programme.desc: A look back on Tupac's final years through the eyes of Rap legends "Eazy-E", Russell Simmons and Tupac's personal bodyguard, Frank Alexander. Featuring never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Music Revolution
programme.desc: Learn why Common enjoys creating music as well as acting, and how icons Michael Jackson and Michael Jordan influenced him to dream big. Kendrick Lamar reflects on how his music comes from his Compton roots and how he wants to inspire young people.

programme.title: Vince Gill, Patty Loveless, Dustin Lynch
programme.desc: Vince Gill, Patty Loveless and Dustin Lynch take the stage from the Opry House in Nashville, TN.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins recalls memories of summers past in this scene originally painted on July 4, 1995.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Joyce Ortner captures the true beauty of the ocean waves, blue and enchanting in this breathtaking seascape masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Discover a purple night-sky scene with a mountain overlooking a little falling river -- Bob Ross creates a spectacular masterpiece today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Hike into the midst of a snow-covered forest with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of leafless trees in slumber and texture you can almost feel.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel deep into the forest with Bob Ross and discover the beauty and serenity of an elegant waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross puts a lonesome cabin in the middle of a snowy setting as an unexpected place of respite for the weary traveler.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The beach is such a lovely sight as afternoon comes to an end - Bob Ross paints this seascape with gold, purple and orange hues.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Real or imaginary? It doesn't matter which as Bob Ross captures a great mountain and forest scene on specially cut plywood!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beautiful foliage and fierce skies with an almighty mountain overlooking a calm lake. Watch Bob Ross paint this challenging scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificent power and vibrant color in the sea and sky! Watch Bob Ross as he tries to tame this beautiful ocean painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints some of Nature's most awesome creations - magnificent snow-covered mountains! Beauty you just have to experience.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch and learn as Bob Ross creates crashing waves in this moonlit setting - see what a simple black canvas can do.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A happy little winter landscape, inside a happy little oval - with homey barn and lacy bushes -- another real Bob Ross classic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross at an old log cabin nestled deep in the powdery woods! An intriguing yet simple painting just beckoning you to paint it yourself.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: One of nature's perfect creations -- the misty, splashing waterfall -- is painted by Bob Ross, in all its magnificent splendor.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the blissful pleasure of the coldest season under a splendid pastel sky with Bob Ross; enjoy this fabulous mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this landscape, Bob Ross paints a faraway mountain snuggled in with bright green trees and bushes mirrored in glistening waters.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beneath a soft purple mountain range, lots of trees and bushes surround a secret little lake, as only Bob Ross can create on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a tiny waterfall tucked beside a glassy lake, while surrounded by snowy majestic peaks and distant evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The delicate use of beautiful shades of lavender and green makes this glimpse inside a forest, with Bob Ross, an enjoyable challenge.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to the tropics with Bob Ross, stroll along the palm tree shores, and drink in the soul-cleansing beauty of the sea. An oval masterpiece you'll enjoy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to the coldest place imaginable with Bob Ross and find a lonely cabin comfortably nestled on the edge of a glassy-smooth frozen pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel down an abandoned road with Bob Ross and stumble upon an old weathered barn that has seen better days - what dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross and visit the north in the middle of winter! Snow and ice abound in a profusion of beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night - all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Painter Bob Ross invites you to enjoy the last of winter's snowy touch on canvas, as mountains and valleys begin to emerge from their slumber.

programme.desc: A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism.

programme.desc: In Indestructible Man, a violent criminal named Butcher Benson is executed and becomes indestructible when he’s brought back to life.

programme.desc: An animated pixie named Coily grants a man his wish that all springs disappear...a wish that he soon regrets.

programme.title: MST3K: Parts: The Clonus Horror
programme.desc: Scientists run a clone farm for VIPs while Pearl and her goons are forced into babysitting omnipotent Space Children.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Alex tries to save a friends daughter from a religious cult and is captured.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After an accident forces Pete Thornton to retire from the foundation, MacGyver suspects foul play within the organization and uncovers a plot to assassinate a visiting Third World Leader.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A box of mutilated flowers and slashed photos drives pop-singer Shanda into a state of shock. After she collapses and her road tour grinds to a halt, Dr. Mark Sloan takes pity on Shanda and embarks on a search to find her mysterious stalker.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: The hilarious, accidentally brilliant Inspector Clouseau once again takes on his archenemy, the insane Dreyfus, as he plots to control the world.

programme.title: Pink Panther Strikes Again
programme.desc: Chief Inspector Dreyfus (Herbert Lom) is finally driven mad by Inspector Clouseau's (Peter Sellers) incompetence and commandeers a doomsday device along with a demand for Clouseau’s death. Are 26 hired assassins a match for Clouseau's dumb luck?

programme.title: Revenge of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Peter Sellers’ comedic genius shines when the hapless Inspector Clouseau is presumed to be dead. However, the very much alive Inspector travels to Hong Kong to investigate a dangerous drug lord (Robert Webber). Dyan Cannon and Herbert Lom also star.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray stars as Tripper who guides a fun-seeking collection of lovable campers and libidinous staff members through the unique pleasures of a hysterical coed summer experience.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Hair
programme.desc: A country boy and Vietnam draftee embark on an adventure of a lifetime when he meets a group of counterculture hippies and his eyes are opened to the darker side of class, race, and big city life in this adaptation of the Broadway sensation.

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever
programme.desc: John Travolta performs as the troubled Tony Manero - Brooklyn paint store clerk by day and undisputed king of the dance floor by night. A powerful and provocative urban tragedy that carries as much significance today as it did in 1977.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: The fate of mankind rests in the hands of a teenager (Matthew Broderick) who accidentally taps into the Defense Department's tactical computer. Dabney Coleman and Ally Sheedy co-star.

programme.title: To Live And Die In L.A.
programme.desc: Federal agent Richard Chance has a score to settle, and he's through playing by the rules. He vows to take down a murderous counterfeiter by any means necessary. But as the stakes grow higher, will Chance's obsession ultimately destroy him?

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: The rules for a Mogwai are simple: Keep your Mogwai away from water, bright lights and, most importantly, never feed him after midnight. But in Kingston Falls the rules are broken, and the consequences multiply at an alarming rate.

programme.title: Purple Rain
programme.desc: Rock star Prince makes a spectacular feature film debut in this highly autobiographical blockbuster that won both an Oscar and a Grammy award.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Lots of laughs and a great camaraderie is the recipe for two street-wise cops that have decided to quit the force and open a bar.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: Face/Off
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole’s career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When Shelley gets kicked out of the mansion, she's lost in the wilds of Beverly Hills until she stumbles upon the sorriest sorority on campus. Now it's up to her to spruce up the girls and heat up the Zeta house before the University shuts them down.

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Three-time male model of the year, Derek Zoolander, is devastated when he loses the title to newbie Hansel. After the news, Mugatu's fashion empire brainwashes Derek into being an assassin.

programme.title: The Love Guru
programme.desc: A hilarious comedy starring Mike Myers as guru Pitka in his first original character since the blockbuster hit Austin Powers.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Super-spies Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) and Ingrid (Carla Gugino) give up their lives of intrigue to raise their children. After a sinister super-villain kidnaps the parents, it's up to the kids to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: In the sequel, the OSS now has a full child-spy section and our hero siblings Carmen and Juni Cortez have become agents. On a mission to recover a dangerous device that threatens the entire world, they enlist the skills of their family.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: West Side Story

programme.title: Topkapi

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: A famous cat burglar who has retired to the Riviera catches a thief imitating his old style.

programme.title: The War of the Worlds (1953)
programme.desc: Gene Barry and Ann Robinson are among the humans intrigued when a meteor-like object crashes to Earth … but its occupants are definitely not friendly.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers

programme.title: Regarding Henry
programme.desc: Henry Turner is a New York lawyer who needs to win at any cost. But a single gunshot brings Henry’s fast-track rise to a dead stop, leaving him incapacitated and with no memory of the life he used to lead.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Terms of Endearment dazzled critics and audiences alike with its believable, insightful story of two captivating people, mother and daughter, unforgettably played by Shirley MacLaine and Debra Winger.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button

programme.title: The Cabin in the Woods

programme.title: The Mist
programme.desc: Trapped townspeople (Thomas Jane, Marcia Gay Harden, Laurie Holden) face monsters inside and out after a supernatural fog engulfs their Maine community.

programme.desc: A university professor and a team of students conduct an experiment on a young woman, uncovering terrifyingly dark, unexpected forces in the process.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A misfit boy (Kodi Smit-McPhee) suspects that his only friend (Chloë Grace Moretz), an eerie child who only appears at night, is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark
programme.desc: On Halloween 1968, Stella and her two friends meet a mysterious drifter, Ramón, and uncover a sinister notebook of stories.

programme.title: The Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Two unseen scientists manipulate the gory goings-on at a backwoods cabin inhabited by a group of unsuspecting college friends (Kristen Connolly, Chris Hemsworth, Anna Hutchison).

programme.title: Eurotrip
programme.desc: Europe will never be the same again after Scotty Thomas and his buddies take off for the express to excess! They're hooking up with hot strangers and jamming all the extreme insanity they can into the wildest trip of their lives!

programme.title: Hard Boiled [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: A tough-as-nails cop teams up with an undercover agent to shut down a sinister mobster and his crew.

programme.title: In The Mood For Love
programme.desc: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.

programme.title: Blades of Glory

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer

programme.desc: Rookie cops Jonah Hill and Channing Tatum go undercover as students to bust a high school drug ring - with hysterically disastrous results!

programme.desc: Bill (Michael Sheen) and Kate’s (Maria Bello) already strained marriage is tested when their college-age son commits a shocking act of violence that reverberates across the country.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) lives on a Wyoming ranch with his only friend, Mitch (Morgan Freeman). Then, suddenly, the woman he blames for his son's death arrives at his door broke, desperate, and with a granddaughter he's never known.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers

programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.
